name: Mushroom Bacon Stuffing
recipeIngredient: Freshly ground black pepper - to taste
20 slices Firm textured white bread - cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 12-inch skillet over medium heat, cook bacon until golden.
2. Remove bacon to paper towels to drain.
3. Crumble bacon into a large bowl; set aside.
4. Pour off all but 1/4 cup bacon drippings from the skillet.
5. Add butter to the skillet and melt over medium heat.
6. Add mushrooms, celery, onion, sage, marjoram, and pepper.
7. Cook for 10 minutes stirring occasionally until vegetables are tender.
8. Remove from heat; add vegetable mixture to the bacon in bowl.
9. Add bread cubes; toss well to mix.
10. Pour egg over stuffing; toss to blend.
11. Makes 12 to 14 cups, enough to stuff 12 to 14 pound turkey.
